welcome.subtitle: Let's get you set up in a few quick steps. Only your password is required — everything else is optional and adjustable anytime.

password.heading: Secure your setup
password.description: Choose a password to protect access to your modem interface.
password.hint_name: Shown in the sidebar. You can change this anytime.
password.error_strong_requirements: Password must be at least 5 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
password.error_basic_requirements: Password must be at least 5 characters.

network_mode.heading: Preferred network
network_mode.description: How should your modem connect? You can change this anytime in Settings.
network_mode.mode_desc_auto: Connect to the best available network

band_locking.heading: Band preferences
band_locking.description: Lock specific frequency bands for better signal on your network.
band_locking.error_bands_unavailable: Unable to load supported bands from the modem. You can skip this step and configure bands later.
band_locking.loading_bands: Loading supported bands from the modem…
band_locking.error_no_bands: No supported bands were returned by the modem.

connection.heading: Configure your connection
connection.description: Set up your data APN or create a custom SIM profile.

done.heading: You're all set!
done.description: QManager is ready. Everything you configured is active, and you can change any setting anytime from the sidebar.
done.callout_body: <bold>Pro tip:</bold> Visit <menu>Cellular › Band Locking</menu> to fine-tune signal strength, or <menu>Monitoring › Watchdog</menu> to set up automatic recovery.
